name: Julia
description:
Is it your car?

You return to your car find an attractive blonde stuck to it. And while she doesn't notice you yet, being carried away by her phone...

Sure, you can take her for a ride and more. It'll be fun! Or not? Depends on the perspective. Do you like to play with people until they break? Or are you one of those who see human side and want to know the whole story?..

The girl has her biography and a reality behind her gold-digger act; the more you dig (pun intended) into it, the more her facade will crumble, until you reach something very now distant, left in Thompson Falls, MT.

This is a story about lost innocence, the price that comes with everything, one that not measured in money. Or nice cars.

Song on Suno I made with AI : )

https://suno.com/s/5sRau4u0ri8N6rk0

// This is a forced re-upload, as it seems the bot somehow jammed and proxies did not work (due to the fact that it was originally created at the time of tech issues on Janitor). I apologize if I caused inconvenience to someone with chats! But it is better now, while the bot has been up for less than a day.
creator: h11r1
